title: Comforting Crisp American Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A sweet, comforting American dish featuring caramelized sweet potatoes, crunchy pecans, and sweet sultanas, perfect for a cozy dinner or as a side for the holidays.
instructions: Pierce the sweet potatoes with a fork several times and bake them in the oven for 45 minutes, or until tender.
While the sweet potatoes are baking, prepare the streusel topping by mixing together the flour, brown sugar, and pecans in a bowl.
Add the softened butter to the bowl and mix until the streusel topping is crumbly.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, vanilla extract, and a pinch of salt.
When the sweet potatoes are done, let them cool for a few minutes before scooping the flesh into a bowl and mashing it with a fork.
Add the streusel topping to the mashed sweet potatoes and mix until well combined.
Pour the sweet potato mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and sprinkle the sultanas and confectioners' sugar over the top.
Return the casserole to the oven and bake for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the sultanas are caramelized.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
